name: 기쁜 우리 좋은 날
title: 기쁜 우리 좋은 날
overview_en: The life of startup developer Jo Eun Ae is shattered when her AI creation Joy is stolen by a large corporation through a cold blooded conspiracy Risking a criminal record for obstruction and property damage she struggles to take back the technology she birthed and raised Her search leads her to Ko Gyeol an elite architect and the Young Architect of the Year winner who joins his family s succession race as the leader of the Silver Town TF Gyeol who views the world as a ruthless jungle finds his meticulously built world clashing with Eun Ae s desperate mission Despite their ill fated connection they are forced to work together as a team to reach their goals As the succession race intensifies a fierce struggle for ownership and identity unfolds When the masks of perfection fall away they find that the most beautiful masterpiece is the one they must build together amidst the chaos

name: 두 번째 남편
title: 두 번째 남편
overview_en: When Bong Seon hwa unjustly loses her family due to a tragedy born out of an unstoppable desire she pledges revenge in the mixed fate and love

name: 태희 혜교 지현이
title: 태희 혜교 지현이
overview_en: The series is described as taking a cheerful look at the lives of its female leads their families and friends

name: 저 하늘에 태양이
title: 저 하늘에 태양이
overview_en: In Kyung gives up studying to support her stepmother and younger stepbrother Han Soo The stepmother sells In Kyung to become a concubine to support her son Han Soo In Kyung boards a train for Seoul after learning her fate In Seoul In Kyung goes through numerous hardships to achieve her dreams and to attain love

name: 여름아 부탁해
title: 여름아 부탁해
overview_en: The world is changing and living as a big family is a culture that withered down These days it s even hard to see a nuclear family with so many single people living alone Living with family brings endless conflicts as much as it brings comfort and a solid shoulder to cry on Through a young lady named Geum Hui Home for Summer is a drama about not giving up hope on finding the true meaning of family

name: 이웃집 찰스
title: 이웃집 찰스
overview_en: From following Koreans version of Billy Elliot to Daily routines language acquisition and culture differences this comedy reality show is all about Korean culture and how foreigners deal with it

name: 사랑이 오네요
title: 사랑이 오네요
overview_en: A family drama about a woman who is hurt by love striving for small happiness and realizing the preciousness of family

name: 최고의 연인
title: 최고의 연인
overview_en: Drama series follows the loves and worries of a mother and her two daughters The women are single divorced and remarried

name: 위험한 여자
title: 위험한 여자
overview_en: Dangerous Women is a 2011 South Korean television series starring Go Eun mi Hwang Bo ra Kim Jung hyun and Yeo Hyun soo The morning soap opera aired on MBC on Mondays to Fridays at 7 50 a m from October 10 2011 to March 30 2012 for 124 episodes

name: 황금물고기
title: 황금물고기
overview_en: Golden Fish is a 2010 South Korean television series starring Park Sang won Lee Tae gon Jo Yoon hee and So Yoo jin The daily drama aired on MBC on Mondays to Fridays at 20 15 from May 3 to November 11 2010 for 133 episodes

name: صانعة الحلوى
title: صانعة الحلوى
overview_en: A single mom overcomes a broken heart and betrayal to succeed in life

name: 열아홉 순정
title: 열아홉 순정
overview_en: Yang Gook hwa Korean 양 국화 is a nineteen year old country girl who leaves Yanbian and travels to Seoul because she is marrying Hong Soon goo Korean 홍 순구 the third son in an average but respectable family When she arrives in Seoul however she finds out that her fiancé has just died in a terrible car accident Instead of returning to Yanbian she decides to stay and create a new life in Korea while sending money back to her aunt and uncle

name: 비긴어게인
title: 비긴어게인
overview_en: A variety show gathering some of Korea s best musicians for a series of street performances abroad

name: 찬란한 내 인생
title: 찬란한 내 인생
overview_en: This drama deals with the adversity overcoming of a new life as a young mother who has lived a hard life becomes a daughter of a chaebol It is a story that happens when a young mother who has lived in defiance with all her bad luck becomes a chaebol daughter in the morning It seems to be a drama that looks back on life and family

name: 무인시대
title: 무인시대
overview_en: This is a KBS 1TV drama that aired from February 8 2003 to August 15 2004

name: 아름다운 당신
title: 아름다운 당신
overview_en: This is the story of various characters who learn about love courage healing and savior in the name of family who stand by your side in times of hardships This drama is a beautiful love story which will comfort your exhausted soul

name: 가족을지켜라
title: 가족을지켜라
overview_en: Jung Woo Jin is an ambitious doctor After he failed in love he no longer believes in true love He views marriage as just a business Meanwhile Lee Hae Soo works as an assistant chef She dreams of getting married to the right man and having a family Then Woo Jin falls in love with Hae Soo and He comes into conflict with love and ambition

name: 오로라 공주
title: 오로라 공주
overview_en: Oh Ro ra is a 25 year old woman whose family owns Chunwang Foods a large food conglomerate Both of her parents are in their seventies and a 20 plus age difference exists between Ro ra and her three other male siblings Wang sung Geum sung and Soo sung As the youngest child of a wealthy family Ro ra is charming uber confident and seemingly a spoiled material girl but there s more to her than meets the eye Unafraid to speak her mind she intervenes to salvage her 50 year old second brother s marriage by getting rid of his mistress who had lied about getting pregnant One day she falls head over heels for Hwang Ma ma an irritable novelist and perfectionist But he has one flaw that could torpedo their relationship

name: 훈장 오순남
title: 훈장 오순남
overview_en: This TV show revolves around Oh Soon Nam a teacher at a traditional Korean school called Jeokhyeonjae where she nurtures students aspirations like a friend Soon Nam is also married to the sole descendant of a head family clan that comes with heavy responsibilities Then tragedy strikes her Soon Nam embarks on an investigation to punish the people behind these injustices and finds that she must choose between revenge and values she has lived by all her life Always thinking of loved ones she transforms into a person that people admire for her strength and perseverance in the face of adversity

name: 별이 되어 빛나리
title: 별이 되어 빛나리
overview_en: In 1960 s the family of an optimistic girl Jo Bong hee fell into difficulties after her father s death Then she decided to rekindle her hope and overcomes different obstacles to become the best fashion designer in Korea

name: 아모르 파티 - 사랑하라, 지금
title: 아모르 파티 사랑하라 지금
overview_en: A divorcee with cancer and a penniless single father meet and heal their wounds with the help of each other Do Yeon Hee Choi Jung Yoon is the only daughter in law of a family who runs the Rara Group She has a perfect life but her husband cheats on her Due to the other woman Do Yeon Hee s life changes completely Han Jae Kyeong Ahn Jae Mo used to be a professional golfer To let his wife achieve her dream and support her while she studies abroad he quit playing golf and became a golfing instructor at a practice facility He raises his son by himself while his wife is away When his wife returns to South Korea she asks him for a divorce

name: 분홍 립스틱
title: 분홍 립스틱
overview_en: Yoo Ga Eun is a sweet natured girl who dated and subsequently married her boyfriend Park Jung Woo However she later discovers that her husband had an affair with her best friend Mi Ran and that their adopted daughter is actually Jung Woo and Mi Ran s lovechild To get revenge on them she marries Maeng Ho Geol a wealthy clothing retailer and carefully plots their downfall At the same time Ga Eun also meets Ha Jae Bum the man who falls deeply in love with her and promises to support her by her side no matter what she does

name: 돌아온 황금복
title: 돌아온 황금복
title_en: The Return of Hwang Geum bok
overview_en: Geum Bok Shin Da Eun is ashamed of her mother Jeon Mi Sun who works as a street cleaner Her mother as a single mother has worked hard to support Geum Bok Geum Bok s feelings for for her mother begin to change On their first trip Geum Bok s mother disappears and Geum Bok is now all alone

name: 미워도 사랑해
title: 미워도 사랑해
overview_en: The drama follows the life a woman who ends up losing everything after living a turbulent life When she starts anew from the bottom ironically her life blossoms The value that holds us together is not blood nor law but rather love and affection between us

name: 노란 복수초
title: 노란 복수초
overview_en: Yellow Boots is a drama about the revenge of a woman who lost everything after being framed for a crime

name: 우리집 여자들
title: 우리집 여자들
overview_en: The Women of Our Home is a South Korean television series starring Jung Eun chae Jay Kim Yoon Ah jung and Choi Min sung It aired on KBS1 from May 16 2011 to November 4 2011 on Mondays to Fridays at 20 25 for 125 episodes

name: 마이 리틀 텔레비전
title: 마이 리틀 텔레비전
overview_en: Celebrities and experts from different fields develop content for individual video podcasts that are then aired The contestants juggle their dual roles as podcast creator and podcast host as they compete to get the highest number of views before the show ends

name: 내일도 맑음
title: 내일도 맑음
overview_en: After being fired from her job at a TV home shopping channel Ha Nee decides to start her own fashion company and soon becomes involved with Han Kyul a merchandiser for the shopping channel

name: 비켜라 운명아
title: 비켜라 운명아
overview_en: An ordinary young man from the countryside refuses to settle for the present and tries to carve out his own way to success

overview: دراما تصور لمسة حلوة في الحب بين الوالدين وأطفال ثلاث عائلات تدور حول حب شخصيتين رئيسيتين
name: الحب الملتوي
title: الحب الملتوي
overview_en: A drama depicting a sweet twist in love between the parents and children of three families around the love of two main characters

name: 다함께 차차차
title: 다함께 차차차
overview_en: Two women became widows on the same day same hour Ha Yoon Jeong becomes the matriarch of the family of her husband Yoon Jeong supports them because she feels guilty about her husband s disappearance Oh Dong Ja Yoon Jeong s sister in law has been living with Yoon Jeong s help as well After the terrifying day of losing their husbands the two women have been living as each other s good companions However now they become implacable enemies because of their children What would happen if their daughters rival each other in love What would happen if Yoon Jeong s husband who everyone thought was dead appears before them as the future father in law of Dong Ja s son Could Yoon Jeong and Dong Ja s relation go back to the good old days

name: 세자매
title: 세자매
overview_en: Three Sisters is a daily drama about the lives of two generations of three sisters portraying their relationships and the difficulties they face

name: 맛 좀 보실래요?
title: 맛 좀 보실래요
overview_en: Hae Jin is 36 years old She is married to Jin Sang who is 6 years younger than her and they have a daughter Yoo Ri Hae Jin runs a restaurant that she took over from her father in law She supported her husband Jin Sang while he studied to enter a university Because of Hae Jin Jin Sang is now attending a prestigious university but he has an affair with Joo Ri She is the young daughter of a rich family Hae Jin becomes aware of her husband s affair but she doesn t want a divorce Meanwhile Dae Gu appears in front Hae Jin Dae Gu is a drama series writer He was once in demand for his screenwriting but his popularity has waned His marriage life is not doing well either

overview: إن مهمة حفظ الأمن والسلام في عالم ترين ليست أمرًا هيّنًا ولكن حين نتحدث عن خمسة قطارات قادرة على التحول إلى آليين فكل أزمة ستصبح مغامرة
name: القطارات الخارقة

seasons.name: الموسم 1
seasons.overview: إن مهمة حفظ الأمن والسلام في عالم "ترين" ليست أمرًا هينًا، ولكن حين نتحدّث عن خمسة قطارات قادرة على التحول إلى آليين، فكل أزمة ستصبح مغامرة!

seasons.name: الموسم 2
seasons.overview: يعمل أبطال "ريل ووتش" الشجعان، المسؤولون عن حماية أربع مناطق حيوية، على حفظ السلام في عالم "ريل"... عيشوا معهم المغامرة!

title: القطارات الخارقة
overview_en: Set in the Train World where all citizens are trains However among the residents there are special trains that can transform into robots the Robot Trains Featuring our 5 train heroes with special powers Kay Alf Duck Selly and Victor and their exciting adventures Can the Robot Trains save the village from the evil dark forces that be

name: 소원을 말해봐
title: 소원을 말해봐
overview_en: This drama is about entangled lives of four women a stepmother and daughter of a small diner and another stepmother and daughter of a nation wide food service company CE Group These four women s lives start to be entangled with a suspicious hit and run of a man who then is blamed for embezzlement enrages of CE Group while he in a coma from the accident Without any money or connections the man s widow goes on a crusade to prove her husband s innocence and many obstacles and hardships are encountered along her arduous journey A suspenseful plot and a story about stepmothers and daughters bring up the rear to present a heartwarming drama to viewers

name: 헬로 베이비
title: 헬로 베이비
overview_en: Hello Baby is a South Korean reality show where celebrities experience parenthood by raising children ages 5 and under The main purpose is to see whether or not the celebrities make good parents

name: 루비 반지
title: 루비 반지
overview_en: After a devastating accident an ambitious reporter secretly steals the identity of her successful sister When the sister awakens with total amnesia she is forced into a life built on lies As memories slowly return she uncovers the ultimate betrayal triggering a dark path toward revenge and destruction

name: 용의 눈물
title: 용의 눈물
overview_en: This drama depicts the turbulent period spanning from the reign of King Taejo born Lee Seong Gye the founder of the Joseon dynasty to King Sejong

name: 엔시티 라이프
title: 엔시티 라이프
overview_en: Variety show featuring South Korean boy band NCT and their life in the city at various locations around the world
